raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ehl fazzija Akitowels
lis Absalonn: Laïd es
Ediwipadefmits tubksto-
schus Wihrus islaſſu/ tad es zel-
schohs/ un dsihſchohs Dahwi-
dam paffat Nakti/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es nahſchu pahr wiꞥ-
nu/ zeekains wiꞥsch peekuffs/
un winna Rohkas nogurrufchas
irr/ un isbeedeschu winnu/ ka wiſ-
fi Landis/ kas pee ta irr aisbehg/
tad kauschu es to Rehnizu ween/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es weddifchu wiſſus
Landis atpallat/ pee tewi. Kad
tad wiſſi buhs atgreeſufchees/
(wiꞥsch jo ween irr tas Wihrs/ ko
tu mekle/) tad buhs wiſſi Landis
ar Meeru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi Walloda patikke Ab-
saloman/ un wiﬀeem Israëta
Wezzajeem labbi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Absaloms: Ali-
zinajeet jelle Usajn to Arkiteri ar-
ridsan/ un dsirdefim/ ko wiꞥsch
fakka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Usajus pee Absa-
loma nahze/ tad runnaja Absa-
loms us to/ un fazzija: Ta un
ta irr Akitowels runnajs/ buhs
munis pehz winna Wahrdü dar-
riht jeb ne? runna tu arridsan.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Usajus us Ab-
salonn: Tas Padohins/ ko Akito-
wels schim Brihscham dewis/ ne
irr labs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Usajus: Tu
pasihsti tarnu Tehwu un winna
Wihrus/ ka tee Warreni irr/ un
ar pikschu Prahtu/ itt ka weens
Lahzis/ kam Behrni paneinti Lau-
kâ/ ir taws Tehws irr weens Kar-
ra-Wihrs/ un ne paliks Nakti
pee teem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ nu irr wiꞥsch ap-
flehpees kahdâ Allâ/ jeb kahdâ
zittâ Weetâ/ kad nu tas notiktu/
ka Eẜahkumâ zaur teem zitti
tohp apkauti/ tad fazzibs ikkatrs/
kas to Slawn dsirdehs: Weena
Kaufhana irr notikkuti pee teem
Laudim/ kas Absalomam pak-
kat staiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad jaschu tee paschi
Warrence/ kam zittadi tahda
Sirđs irr ka weenam Lauwam
weenâ Reisê bailofees. Jo wiſe
Israëls finna/ ka taws Tehws
warrens irr/ un ka tee stipri Lau-
dis/ kas pee winna irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet mans Padohins irr
schis/ lai wiſs Israëls pee ten
tohp fapulzinahts no Dannas
lihds Bersabai/ ka Smiltis Juhr
Mallâ Pulkâ: Un eij tu patsa
winneem Karrâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahktin mehs pe
winna jeb kahdâ Weetâ/ ku
wiꞥsch taps atrasts/ un nahktin
pahr winnu/ ka ta Rassa wir
Semmes friht/ un ne atlizzina
sim no winna/ jeb no wiﬀeen
Wibreem/ kas pee winna irr/ ni-
weenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja wiꞥsch kahdâ Vile-
sahta eelihdihs/ tad peemettih
wiſ
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
